rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant to the citing study’s core governance question: both focus on OEM–supplier engineered component contracts in the same SIC 35/36/37 context and emphasize investment–governance alignment and performance outcomes. The notes also show very similar survey frames (521 qualified contacts; ~193 vs 191 usable contracts), suggesting the 2005 article is likely a foundational/empirical antecedent rather than an incidental mention.
